description: A German supermarket chain is deploying bcWebCam at self-checkout stations integrated with their NCR POS system. The POS integration requires three specific settings: the scanner must send a TAB keystroke after each barcode scan (the POS moves the cursor to the next input field on TAB), duplicate scans must be prevented for 3 seconds (customers sometimes accidentally scan items twice during slow checkout), and the acoustic beep must be disabled (the POS terminal plays its own audio feedback). Configure bcWebCam with these three settings to make it compatible with the NCR POS integration.
